summary: Response rates dipped slightly in FY23 while NYCHA's exterminator staff were being reorganized, then jumped sharply starting FY24 after NYCHA created a dedicated rapid-response rat team (October 2023) and consolidated exterminators under a centralized Pest Control Department. Both moves were part of NYCHA's push to meet pest-control deadlines in its 2019 consent agreement with the federal Department of Housing and Urban Development.

sources.label: NYCHA, Fiscal 2023 and Fiscal 2025 Mayor's Management Reports
U.S. Dept. of Justice, "Manhattan U.S. Attorney Announces Settlement With NYCHA and NYC"
